title: team-bootstrap role frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter at the top of each role.md file in references/roles/.

name.description: Role identifier; matches the role name used in pipelines and handoffs.

version.description: Semantic version of the role playbook.

model.description: Model the role was authored against (e.g. claude-opus-4-7).

compatible_pipelines.description: Pipelines this role is allowed to participate in.

allow.description: Tools the role may invoke. Built-in names (Read, Edit, Write, Bash, Grep, Glob, etc.) or `mcp__<server>__<tool>` for explicit MCP tools.

deny.description: Tools explicitly forbidden, even if otherwise covered by `allow` or `mcp`.

mcp.description: MCP server names; all of the server's tools are implicitly in `allow` unless listed in `deny`.

permission_mode.description: Default permission mode the harness uses for this role's tool calls. See references/irreversibility.md.
